evidence.quote_or_summary: Experience advanced, personalized care in a boutique medspa where modern medicine meets timeless aesthetics. Our focus is natural, transformative results through a thoughtful balance of injectables and skin health. Led by Yelena Burshteyn, NP-C, our team combines medical expertise with an artistic eye to create results that feel natural and timeless. Our boutique injectables are curated for precision and impact, delivered only by expert providers who know how to achieve a flawless, radiant beauty that’s fresh, natural, and entirely your own. Aluna Aesthetics offers neurotoxin treatments to soften fine lines, relax tension, and refresh your look with subtle, natural results. Aluna Aesthetics offers dermal fillers to restore volume, enhance lips, and smooth under-eyes with soft, natural results. **Expert Care.** Our injectables are administered by providers who specialize in balance aesthetic precision. **Natural Results.** We enhance your features to achieve a fresh, effortless look that stays true to your beauty. Book your personalized appointment today and take the first step toward refined results.
evidence.title: Aluna Aesthetics | Boutique Medspa in Potomac, Maryland

evidence.quote_or_summary: # How to Choose the Right Medical Spa for You. A medical spa, or med spa, blends the soothing environment of a day spa with medical-grade treatments usually found in a doctor's office. For patients, it's important to understand that not all med spas are created equal. The gold standard is a med spa run by a physician with specialized training in the treatments offered – typically a board-certified plastic surgeon, facial plastic surgeon or dermatologist. That's why it's important to do your research before choosing a facility. It's important to choose a provider who is trained to handle any complications that may arise during or after your treatment. The best way to be sure you're in safe hands is to see a physician with specialized training in the types of procedures – and areas of the body – commonly treated in a med spa setting.
evidence.title: How to Choose the Right Medical Spa for You | ASPS

evidence.quote_or_summary: Physician-led spas conduct thorough consultations, review your medical background, and customize your treatment plan with an eye for both beauty and health.
evidence.title: Why Choose a Physician-Led Med Spa? 5 Key Benefits for Safety ...

evidence.quote_or_summary: How to Choose the Right Medical Spa: What to Look for Before Your First Treatment. # How to Choose the Right Medical Spa: What to Look for Before Your First Treatment. A medical spa blends medical grade treatments only found in doctors offices with a more relaxing environment, all overseen by a trusted care provider. The gold standard is a med spa run by a physician with specialized training in the treatments offered – typically a board-certified plastic surgeon, who has in-depth knowledge on facial anatomy and producing best aesthetic outcomes. Although most treatments offered at med spas are relatively low risk, they still involve your health and your appearance, and require medical knowledge, clinical judgment, and thorough training to perform them safely and effectively. When choosing a med spa, make sure they offer the specific procedures you’re looking for and have experience performing them safely and effectively. Med spa provider credentials, experience and professional referrals should hold the most importance.
evidence.title: How to Choose the Right Medical Spa: What to Look for Before Your First Treatment. - Robert Freund MD

angle_2.contradicts_angle_1: Reviews optimize for outcomes; forums optimize for trust and process.

angle_3.thesis: Owned site positioning and regional news frame physician-trust and VIP experience.
